description: Shazam is a music discovery service that identifies songs and publishes artist, song, album, chart, and radio airplay pages on the web. It is owned by Apple and is used to track and surface music recognition trends worldwide.
summary: Shazam exposes a public MCP server at `https://www.shazam.com/mcp?auth=92807691` using streamable HTTP and requiring no authentication; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on shazam.com.
